response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist engineer with 15+ years of experience and genuine staff-level seniority, but his AI-specific background is limited to roughly one year at re:cinq (April 2025–present), falling far short of the required 8+ years of production-grade AI solution delivery. Critical technical requirements are unmet: Python does not appear in his skill set despite being the lingua franca of AI/ML engineering, and there is no mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation pipelines anywhere in his history. His current role does mention MCP code generators and agentic workflows, which is directionally relevant, but the depth and duration of that experience is insufficient for a Staff-level GenAI engineering role.
strengths: Active contributor to MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure in his current role at re:cinq, directly aligned with the role's key technologies
Deep, multi-decade TypeScript/Node.js expertise with demonstrated staff-level ownership across complex distributed systems (Optilyz, Dunnhumby, Altom)
AWS CDK hands-on experience and a track record of working across cloud, embedded, and data-integration layers, showing adaptability to enterprise infrastructure
concerns: Python is absent from his listed skills and work history, despite being the primary language for AI/ML engineering and a core requirement of the role
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or any GenAI-specific system design prior to April 2025
AI experience spans approximately one year versus the stated minimum of 8 years building production-grade AI solutions — a gap too large for a Staff-level position
